# Self-hosted web fonts

Vendored so the API docs make **zero third-party requests** (no calls to
`fonts.googleapis.com` / `fonts.gstatic.com`). Each family's SIL Open Font
License text and copyright notice are kept in the `*-OFL.txt` files beside this
one, as the license requires.

| Family | Weights | Subsets | License |
|---|---|---|---|
| Montserrat | 300, 400, 700 | latin | [SIL Open Font License 1.1](https://openfontlicense.org) |
| Roboto | 300, 400, 700 | latin | [SIL Open Font License 1.1](https://openfontlicense.org) |

Source: Google Fonts. To refresh, re-download the `woff2` files for the same
weights and keep `fonts.css` in sync.
